description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new workspace in English (US) using the Pacific time zone, enable auto-transcription only for meetings longer than 10 minutes, and configure speaker labels to show first names only.
tasks.name: Create a new workspace in English (US) using the Pacific time zone, enable auto-transcription only for meetings longer than 10 minutes, and configure speaker labels to show first names only.
tasks.description: Create a new workspace in English (US) using the Pacific time zone, enable auto-transcription only for meetings longer than 10 minutes, and configure speaker labels to show first names only.

tasks.instruction: In your meetings list, filter to the last 30 days, focus on internal product roadmap meetings with at least three participants, sort them by duration (longest first), open the longest one, and tag it as high priority.
tasks.name: In your meetings list, filter to the last 30 days, focus on internal product roadmap meetings with at least three participants, sort them by duration (longest first), open the longest one, and tag it as high priority.
tasks.description: In your meetings list, filter to the last 30 days, focus on internal product roadmap meetings with at least three participants, sort them by duration (longest first), open the longest one, and tag it as high priority.

tasks.instruction: From your past meetings, open the most recent client demo call that lasted about 45 minutes, then create a view-only share link for its transcript that is password-protected, set to expire in 7 days, and copy the link.
tasks.name: From your past meetings, open the most recent client demo call that lasted about 45 minutes, then create a view-only share link for its transcript that is password-protected, set to expire in 7 days, and copy the link.
tasks.description: From your past meetings, open the most recent client demo call that lasted about 45 minutes, then create a view-only share link for its transcript that is password-protected, set to expire in 7 days, and copy the link.

tasks.instruction: From the billing area, start a monthly free trial of the least expensive plan that includes at least 200 transcription minutes per month and supports at least 10 team members, using a team size of 8.
tasks.name: From the billing area, start a monthly free trial of the least expensive plan that includes at least 200 transcription minutes per month and supports at least 10 team members, using a team size of 8.
tasks.description: From the billing area, start a monthly free trial of the least expensive plan that includes at least 200 transcription minutes per month and supports at least 10 team members, using a team size of 8.

tasks.instruction: Create a team meeting template for a weekly standup with four agenda sections for updates, blockers, priorities, and next steps, set the default duration to 15 minutes, enable automatic highlighting of action items, and make it the default for meetings scheduled on Mondays at 10:00 AM.
tasks.name: Create a team meeting template for a weekly standup with four agenda sections for updates, blockers, priorities, and next steps, set the default duration to 15 minutes, enable automatic highlighting of action items, and make it the default for meetings scheduled on Mondays at 10:00 AM.
tasks.description: Create a team meeting template for a weekly standup with four agenda sections for updates, blockers, priorities, and next steps, set the default duration to 15 minutes, enable automatic highlighting of action items, and make it the default for meetings scheduled on Mondays at 10:00 AM.

tasks.instruction: Create an English (US) custom vocabulary list with at least five commonly used business and SaaS terms, apply it globally to all workspaces, and turn on the option to use custom vocabulary by default.
tasks.name: Create an English (US) custom vocabulary list with at least five commonly used business and SaaS terms, apply it globally to all workspaces, and turn on the option to use custom vocabulary by default.
tasks.description: Create an English (US) custom vocabulary list with at least five commonly used business and SaaS terms, apply it globally to all workspaces, and turn on the option to use custom vocabulary by default.

tasks.instruction: Open a recent sprint-planning meeting transcript, merge two consecutive segments from the same speaker into one, rename the generic 'Speaker 1' label to that speaker's real first name, and highlight three distinct action items in the transcript, assigning each to a different owner.
tasks.name: Open a recent sprint-planning meeting transcript, merge two consecutive segments from the same speaker into one, rename the generic 'Speaker 1' label to that speaker's real first name, and highlight three distinct action items in the transcript, assigning each to a different owner.
tasks.description: Open a recent sprint-planning meeting transcript, merge two consecutive segments from the same speaker into one, rename the generic 'Speaker 1' label to that speaker's real first name, and highlight three distinct action items in the transcript, assigning each to a different owner.

tasks.instruction: Update your notification settings so you only receive email summaries for meetings longer than 30 minutes where you are the organizer, turn off real-time desktop popups, and enable a daily digest email at 6:00 PM.
tasks.name: Update your notification settings so you only receive email summaries for meetings longer than 30 minutes where you are the organizer, turn off real-time desktop popups, and enable a daily digest email at 6:00 PM.
tasks.description: Update your notification settings so you only receive email summaries for meetings longer than 30 minutes where you are the organizer, turn off real-time desktop popups, and enable a daily digest email at 6:00 PM.

tasks.instruction: In analytics, filter to the last 30 days for the Sales team’s demo meetings longer than 20 minutes, then pin the chart that shows total meeting time per user to your default dashboard.

target_names: Sales demos last 30 days - total meeting time by user

tasks.name: In analytics, filter to the last 30 days for the Sales team’s demo meetings longer than 20 minutes, then pin the chart that shows total meeting time per user to your default dashboard.
